name: Portobello Mushrooms Sauteed in Garlic and Wine
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a medium-sized saute pan over medium heat and add the olive oil.
2. Add the sliced onions and cook until they are soft, about 5 minutes.
3. Stir in the chopped garlic and sugar, then continue cooking for another 5 minutes.
4. Add the beef bouillon cubes and dry red wine to the pan. Stir until the bouillon is fully dissolved.
5. Cook until most of the wine has been absorbed, approximately 4-5 minutes.
6. Add the Portobello mushroom caps and cook on medium heat until they are soft, about 5 total minutes (turning them occasionally).
7. Transfer the cooked mushroom caps to a serving plate and top with the sauce from the pan.
8. Serve hot.
